messages.content: Build a pure Decider for an Advertisement aggregate in TypeScript. Export initialState, decide, and evolve with a discriminated union for Command, Event, and State. Throw a typed DomainError when approving a non-draft ad.
Write a Creative Decider with decide/evolve. Commands: upload, review, publish, archive. Throw a typed CreativeError on publishing an unreviewed creative.
Explain briefly how a Decider works, then implement one for an AuctionRoom with open/bid/close commands. Throw on bids below the current high bid.
Implement a Decider for a Bidder aggregate with constraints: strict types, no `any`, throw a typed error when placing a bid while suspended.
Build a CampaignFlight Decider from scratch. Commands: schedule, launch, pause, resume, end. Reject launching after endDate.
Write a MediaBuy Decider that tracks committed spend. Reject a commit exceeding the approved budget with a typed error.
Build a projection that reduces Impression events into a per-Advertisement impression-count read model. Use pure project(view, event) and ignore unrelated events.
Project a stream of Click events into a per-Creative CTR read model. Include impressions and clicks fields.
What's the event-sourcing way to project AuctionRoom events into a leaderboard view? Show a minimal example.
Build a projection over AttributionEvent streams that tallies conversions per Segment. Keep the view immutable.
Implement a Snapshot upgrader for an Advertisement aggregate. Support v1 -> v2 (add `priority`) and v2 -> v3 (split `headline` into `title` and `subtitle`).
Write a Snapshot loader for AuctionRoom. Versions: v1 had only `highBid`; v2 added `highBidder`; v3 added `reservePrice`. Include a CURRENT_VERSION constant and chained upgraders.
Add snapshot support to a Bidder aggregate: every N events save a Snapshot, then on rehydrate start from the snapshot plus tail events.
Build an append-with-expectedRevision path for an AdSlot stream. Convert an EventStore conflict into a typed ConcurrencyConflict.
Write a safe Advertisement update that reads the stream, evolves the state, decides, and appends with expectedRevision. Raise ConcurrencyConflict on mismatch.
Build a CommandHandler over an EventStore for the Creative aggregate. Load events, decide, append with expected revision.
Wrap a CommandHandler for AdSlot in Effect.gen. Load the stream, decide, append. Keep the core pure.
How do I orchestrate a command for a Bidder aggregate without leaking business logic into the handler? Show a minimal CommandHandler.
Constraint-driven: write a handle() for CampaignFlight that accepts an optional idempotencyKey and short-circuits if the stream already contains that key.
Build a subscription runner that projects Impression events into a read store, resuming from the last checkpoint after a restart.
Explain briefly why checkpoints are written AFTER applying the event, then implement a crash-safe subscription for Click events.
Write a Subscription for AttributionEvent streams using Effect.gen. Resume from checkpoint, apply, persist.
Build a generic aggregateStream(events, evolve, initial) helper and use it to fold an Advertisement stream into state.
Implement when(state, event) for a Click aggregate as a pure reducer. Include an aggregate helper that reduces an array of events.
How do I fold an async iterable of AuctionRoom events into current state without mutating the input? Show a minimal aggregateStream.
Build aggregateStream and when for a Segment aggregate that tracks membership counts. Validate state with a check function.
Implement an upcast() for Impression events. v1 used `adId` as `campaignId`; v2 split it into `advertisementId` and `campaignFlightId`. Throw UnknownEventError on unknown shapes.
Write an upcast() that handles raw Creative events from three versions. Default branch throws.
Build a resumable rebuild() that re-projects an Impression read model in batches. Accept `from`, `batchSize`, `project`, and `persist`.
Add progress reporting and graceful resume to a rebuild for Segment conversion views. Persist the cursor alongside the view.
Build a CQRS boundary for AdSlot: handleCommand appends events; queryView reads from a read store. Share the event DU only, not state.
Explain briefly the CQRS split for an Advertisement, then implement handleCommand and queryView. The read store is eventually consistent.
Build a stateless process manager that reacts to AuctionRoom events: on AuctionRoomClosed emit a ChargeBidder command; on BidPlaced over a threshold emit AlertFraud. Return null for others.
Write a stateful Process Manager for a three-step saga: CampaignFlightLaunched -> ReserveInventory; InventoryReserved -> StartBilling; BillingStarted -> done.
Implement translate(domainEvent) that maps Impression events to versioned IntegrationEvent payloads. Internal-only events return null.
Build appendWithOutbox(stream, events, outboxRows, conn) for a transactional outbox. Append to the stream and insert outbox rows in one unit of work. Do not implement the publisher.
Write a readFromStream helper that returns an AsyncIterable of Click events from a given revision. Type the store interface locally.
Build an Effect-wrapped appendToStream for Advertisement events that maps concurrency errors into a typed failure.

Targeted fix: this readStream loop doesn't propagate errors and leaves the cursor dangling. Repair it for AuctionRoom events.

```ts
for await (const e of store.read()) { apply(e); }
```
